Village Chronicles

🪵 🪓 🛖 🪨

PREHISTORIC TRIBES

Chief! You must guide a small band of prehistoric humans in a harsh world. Keep them alive, gather resources, grow your population, build structures, and protect them from winter frost and cannibal raids!

Survival Rules:

  • Food Management: Hunters gather Raw Food. Cooks turn it into Cooked Food. If cooked food runs dry, villagers starve and health plummets.
  • Resting: Villagers lose energy working. They automatically sleep in Huts (or on the cold ground if huts are full, which risks disease).
  • Breeding: When villagers are happy, well-fed, and there are free beds in Huts, idle villagers will mate and spawn babies.
  • Danger & Raids: Chopping trees, mining, and expanding increases the danger level. When full, cannibals will raid the village. Train Warriors and build Watchtowers to survive!
  • Seasons: In Winter, raw food is hard to find, and cold drains health. Stockpile cooked food and wood beforehand!
💀

TRIBE EXTINCT

All your villagers have perished. The harsh prehistoric age has reclaimed your settlement.
